target.title: docs: add section on extending memory with corpus supplements
target.body:
## What this PR adds

A new section **Extending memory with corpus supplements** to the Memory overview doc.

Currently the memory docs only cover built-in memory files and backends (QMD, Honcho, LanceDB). There is no mention that OpenClaw can integrate external knowledge bases through MemoryCorpusSupplement plugins.

This PR:
- Explains the MemoryCorpusSupplement mechanism in plain terms
- Shows ActiveWiki as a concrete example with a ClawHub install command
- Adds a cross-reference to the Community plugins page in Further Reading

## Changed files

- docs/concepts/memory.md — +24 lines (1 new section, 1 cross-link)

## Why

Users who want their agent to access personal documents, research archives, or wikis currently have no path to discover this capability. This section bridges that gap by pointing from core docs to the ecosystem of corpus supplement plugins.
target.author: kiagentkronos-cell
